evidence.detail: Multiple recent posts show likesCount: -1, meaning engagement data is hidden from public view on posts from March 16, March 15, and others
Cannot calculate accurate engagement rate for recent posts due to hidden likes. Visible posts show rates ranging from 0.31% (48 likes/15,237 followers) to 32.13% (4,896 likes/15,237 followers)
Breastfeeding video has 4,896 likes and 506 comments while most other visible posts have 100-200 likes and 5-30 comments, suggesting inconsistent organic reach
fakeInfluencerScore: 0.0, botScore: 0.0, humanScore: 1.0, indicating the account itself appears authentic
Active on TikTok with 85-3,415 likes per video and consistent content themes matching Instagram, showing genuine multi-platform engagement
15,237 followers to 2,713 following (5.62 ratio) is reasonable for a micro-influencer, not exhibiting typical fake account patterns
457 posts over time with consistent twin mom/lifestyle theme, verified status, and business category alignment suggest authentic account development
